sampleValues: Sakshi is confusing Newton's 2nd and 3rd laws in application problems. She consistently applies F=ma correctly in single-body problems but misses reaction forces in two-body systems. Recommend focused practice on free-body diagrams before the next JEE mock exam.

Excellent session. All integration techniques applied correctly — substitution, by parts, and partial fractions. Sakshi is performing above the class average on this topic. Evo recommends moving on to differential equations.

Good conceptual understanding of SN1 vs SN2 reactions, but 2 errors found in stereochemistry outcomes for chiral centres. Review Walden inversion and retention of configuration. Overall progress is solid — just needs targeted revision on this topic.
Coordination compounds in this chapter deal with compounds where a metal ion is surrounded by one or neutral molecules called ligands.
"Am I still just a user in the books, and spanning with a glimpse into formlessness, to maintain?"
